title: scholtzia eatoniana
intro: Scholtzia eatoniana, also known as the lemon-scented button-sage or lemon-scented button bush, is a flowering shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oil. The health benefits of Scholtzia eatoniana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
